image.caption:
Emmett Kelly
The Original Sad Faced Clown


200mm high Sculpture made in stylists clay as a commemorative model for the Emmett Kelly Foundation, USA

Emmett Kelly
The Original Sad Faced Clown


200mm high Sculpture made in stylists clay as a commemorative model for the Emmett Kelly Foundation, USA

Emmett Kelly
The Original Sad Faced Clown


200mm Sculpture made in stylists clay as a commemorative model for the Emmett Kelly Foundation, USA

Tyranosaurus Rex


Clay sculpture, cast into foam latex for the pilot film 'Lost Worlds'.

Tyranosaurus Rex


Clay sculpture, cast into foam latex for the pilot film 'Lost Worlds'.

Tyranosaurus Rex


Clay sculpture, cast into foam latex for the pilot film 'Lost Worlds'.

Eco Theme Park


Huge creatures sculpted largely in expanded polystyrene and cast into fibreglass for the Irish Environmental Agency. To be used as recylcing containers.

Eco Theme Park


Giant Catarpillar with Giant Spider in the background, the man standing next to the spider shows the scale of the sculptures.

Eco Theme Park


Fly on a bottle

Eco Theme Park


This view shows the recycling access point

Eco Theme Park


The Giant Snail is of a size to compete with the Giant Spider, minus the legs!

Eco Theme Park


Likewise, this sculpture of a Giant Ladybird is of the same size as the Giant Snail

Eco Theme Park


The Dragonfly is almost as big as the Giant Ladybird

Eco Theme Park


Including the legs, this is the largest sculpture, closely followed by the Giant Catapillar

NeverEnding Story I, II & III


The first reprresentative picture is from 'Neverending Story III' by Hensons Creature Workshop, while all the others are from the original film.

NeverEnding Story


Creating the Luck Dragon. Sculpted in Clay to be cast into foam latex.

NeverEnding Story


The Giant Racing Snail (motorised) shown as actual size, scuplted into latex and cast into fibreglass. (see next picture for comparative scenery.)

NeverEnding Story


The Rock Biter, see snail in foreground to get size of how big this character is!

NeverEnding Story


Full size animatronic Bat with expandable wings hanging

NeverEnding Story


1/12th size flying model Bat. Fully animatronic, in flight mode

NeverEnding Story


Top of Ivory Tower. 100th scale for mid range shots

NeverEnding Story III


Talking bird. Sculpted for Jim Henson's Creature Shop in 1997. Generated in modelling clay for animated reproduction in foam latex

NeverEnding Story III


Talking bird. Sculpted for Jim Henson's Creature Shop in 1997. Generated in modelling clay for animated reproduction in foam latex

Statue of a Labrador


A life-sized sculpture of a Labrador - Commissioned

Statue of a Labrador


Full sized Bronze cast statue

Mich Laus der Affe


German TV game show awards. Presented to the winners and losers. Approx 50 of each produced. Original sculptures, mould-making, casting and painting

Oor Wullie


Scottish cartoon character published in 'The Sunday Post' from 1936 - 1969.

Oor Wullie


Original 1/4 scale maquette modelled in plasticene

Oor Wullie


Full sized sculpture made in modelling clay, moulded in acrylic 'polydur' and cast in cold cure Bronze fibreglass 2012.

Oor Wullie


Full sized sculpture made in modelling clay, moulded in acrylic 'polydur' and cast in cold cure Bronze fibreglass 2012.

Oor Wullie


Full sized sculpture made in modelling clay, moulded in acrylic 'polydur' and cast in cold cure Bronze fibreglass 2012.

Oor Wullie


Full sized sculpture made in modelling clay, moulded in acrylic 'polydur' and cast in cold cure Bronze fibreglass 2012.

Beginning or End?


Glassfibre from clay. 4ft (1200mm) high. Exhibited at R.B.A galleries 1964

Beginning or End?


Glassfibre from clay. 4ft (1200mm) high. Exhibited at R.B.A galleries 1964

Mrs Bunny


1/4 scale study modelled in clay and cast in plaster. Made while a student in 1964

Mrs Bunny


1/4 scale study modelled in clay and cast in plaster. Made while a student in 1964

Erotic Bakery, Munich


Icing sugar and marzipan models, sculpted in stylists' wax, cast in plaster, 1983

Erotic Bakery, Munich


Icing sugar and marzipan models, sculpted in stylists' wax, cast in plaster, 1983

Samsung Robot


Made to introduce Samsung into European Market as their inaugural TV ad.

Samsung Robot


Complete control over concept, design and suit production

Samsung Robot


Modelled onto life-cast in clay...

Samsung Robot


... for final production in chrome-plated, vacuum formed ABS. 1987

'Lost in Space'


Feature film, 1997. Fantasy tree forms sculpted in expanded polystyrene. Shepperton Studios

'Lost in Space'


Feature film, 1997. Fantasy tree forms sculpted in expanded polystyrene. Shepperton Studios

'Lost in Space'


Feature film, 1997. Fantasy tree forms sculpted in expanded polystyrene. Shepperton Studios

'Return of the Mummy'


Feature film, Sheppereton Studios, 2000. Expanded polystyrene scenery scuplture

TUTANKHAMUN


Private commission and with interest from The British Museum. (cont'd.)

TUTANKHAMUN


Sculpted full size in plasticine with final mask to be finished in gold leaf, gold plating and cold cure lapis lazuli, turquoise, quartz, carnelian, green feldspar and obsidian. (ongoing)

TUTANKHAMUN


Embossed Hieroglyphics to be gold leafed at a later date (ongoing)

TUTANKHAMUN


Showing Vulture and Cobra headdress. (ongoing)
